items.title: Premier League live updates: Tottenham face Wolves; Liverpool take on Crystal Palace
items.summary: Can Tottenham Hotspur find a desperately needed win over Wolves, and will Liverpool edge closer to Champions League qualification? Follow ESPN's live coverage.
